subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! Verily, Thy truthful and trusted servant, who beareth the name Sadiq, hath turned towards the seat of sincerity, seeking the precincts of Thy sacred threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ان عبدک الصادق الامین سمی صادق قد قصد مقعد صدق کریم فناء عتبه قدسک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
